latin: Galileus coram iudicibus Inquisitionis stare coactus est. negare debuit terram circa solem moveri. sed cum surgeret, sub voce murmuravit: 'et tamen movetur.'

questions.prompt: What was Galileo forced to deny?
questions.target: That the earth moves around the sun
choices: That the earth moves around the sun

questions.prompt: What did Galileo whisper as he stood up?

translation: Galileo was forced to stand before the judges of the Inquisition. He had to deny that the earth moves around the sun. But as he rose, he murmured under his breath: 'And yet it moves.'
